'''Aiaks Fwa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who served [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Aiaks Fwa served as a suicide bomber who carried out a job for Jabba. His mission was to infiltrate the Ylesian slave trade and kill the t'landa Til priest that led it.
